description: Language-neutral verification conformance vectors. Each vector: a manifest, a VerificationContext, and the expected VerificationResult.

vectors.description: All bound artifacts match a signed, in-date manifest.
Runtime system_prompt hash differs from the bound hash.
Manifest expires_at is in the past.
Manifest id is present in the revocation store.
Unsigned manifest must never be VALID (fail-closed).
Signed manifest with no trusted keys is UNVERIFIABLE.
Unsupported manifest version is rejected before verifying.
agent_id altered after signing invalidates the signature.
Required HITL with an unexpired approval passes under enforce_hitl.
enforce_hitl with no hitl_record fails closed.
Expired HITL approval is surfaced regardless of enforcement.
Delegation chain with no public keys is UNVERIFIABLE.
Memory baseline past its TTL is reported EXPIRED.
Decision-trace audit chain root matches the runtime root.
RAG corpus with a flagged poisoning scan fails verification.
Bound tool_manifest with no runtime hash is INCOMPLETE in strict mode.
enforce_attestation with no attestation block is ATTESTATION_UNAVAILABLE.
Attestation report hash matching the canonical manifest hash verifies.
Signed single-hop delegation chain bound to the manifest issuer verifies.
